CCP 2033.280. NO TIMELY OPPOSITION FILED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBORROWMAN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to deem admitted GRANTED. CCP 2033.280. No timely opposition filed.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Denied
